observation.summary: macos-provider-cli-review migration notes still described provider CLI review, workdir policy, provider-neutral runtime packages, and concrete provider adapters as reader-authored prose while active facts already lived in domain SSOT and public workflows.

hypothesis.summary: A focused migration-docs manifest can generate the macOS provider CLI review slice and anchor each RIID page to its owning SSOT or workflow evidence.

execution.summary: Generate the macOS provider CLI review entrypoint and seven slice pages from fragments with source checks for C11 Store policy, workspace policy, bridge/detectutil, runtimeactor, controlplane, Claude, and Codex evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects doc drift, missing fragments, missing workflow evidence upload, and missing source anchors for migration claims.

retrospective.summary: The macOS provider CLI review migration slice now becomes executable evidence instead of manual migration history.

evidence.proves: macOS provider CLI review migration docs are generated and source anchors remain present
public CI uploads macOS provider CLI review migration evidence
